emails.subject: UETA/UCITA presentation - Thursday 12/14 10 a.m. - Room 4741
emails.body: Julia Mark FYI. I am not sure who (if anyone) from your groups would be interested in this topic, but I wanted you to know that Bob Frank has arranged a presentation on the UETA UCITA matter. Jim Forwarded by James D Steffes/NA/Enron on 12/12/2000 04:14 PM Robert Frank 12/12/2000 11:51 AM
